seoTitle: Calavos vs Calcium — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Calavos and Calcium. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calavos and Calcium.
heading: Calavos vs Calcium — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calavos, Queensland and Calcium, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calcium has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Calavos (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calavos or Calcium safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calavos has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Calcium scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calavos scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Calcium scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calavos or Calcium?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calcium has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
